loop1.title: Cumulative Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active and reactive energy for load feeders; supply-side members (Solar Incomers, Transformers) are dark (has_data=N) and honest-blank.

loop1.title: Energy Consumption Trend
loop1.note: Showing energy trend for active feeders (UPS, BPDP, HHF); supply-side feeders (Solar Incomers, Transformers) are dark (has_data=N) and honest-blank their slots.

loop1.title: Today live power analysis
loop1.note: Showing apparent power (kVA) and active/reactive power (kW/kVAr) from panel members. Capacity (rated kVA) and Load Factor are not measured for this asset, so those slots are blank.

loop1.title: Daily Power Demand by Feeder
loop1.note: HHF feeder data is not measured on this panel (no HHF members in roster); UPS and BPDP demand are shown.
